title: Section 3
content: The District Court of Saharanpur shall be 1*** the District Court of such district until the State Government otherwise directs 2***.
footnote: 1. The words “deemed to have been heretofore the District Court of the said district of Dehra Dun and” rep., ibid. 2. The words “and may subject to the provisions of Act 6 of 1871, hear appeals from decisions given in the said district before the passing of this Act” rep. by Act 12 of 1891The words “and may subject to the provisions of Act 6 of 1871, hear appeals from decisions given in the said district before the passing of this Act” rep. by Act 12 of 1891
